name: Cocoa Brownies (Derskin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar and cocoa together.
2. Add the melted butter or margarine and eggs to the mixture. Stir well until combined.
3. Gradually add the flour, baking powder, and vanilla extract. Mix until a smooth batter forms.
4. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes.
Dawnzie derskin@julian.uwo.ca True love or ultimate pity. What's the difference? - V. Erofeev
